.gitignore.general_idea: Added DBeaver IDE configuration directory to gitignore.
Added factory path configuration file to gitignore.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 syntax and semantics required by the migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate Servlet API dependency from javax.servlet (Java EE) to jakarta.servlet (Jakarta EE).
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 10+ (Tomcat 10+); code importing javax.servlet will fail to compile or run on the new server.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JSTL API dependency from javax.servlet.jsp.jstl to jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.servlet.jsp.jstl package is removed in Jakarta EE 10+; code importing javax.servlet.jsp.jstl will fail to compile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JSTL implementation dependency to the Jakarta namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old implementation relies on javax packages which are incompatible with the Jakarta Servlet container; runtime linkage errors will occur.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate Annotation API dependency from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 10+; code importing javax.annotation will fail to compile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Gson library version to a newer release.
Update Log4j Core library version to a newer release.
Update Maven WAR plugin version to a newer release.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Timer.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 10+ compatibility.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Timer.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not available in Jakarta EE 10+ (Tomcat 10.1+), causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Timer.general_idea: Update log4j logging call to use traceEntry() for better structured logging.
Refactor HTML generation to use Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.
Update HTML content structure and links to match new project navigation.
Migrate servlet imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Timer.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not available in Jakarta EE 9+ containers (e.g., Tomcat 10+), causing compilation errors or ClassNotFoundException at runtime.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Timer.general_idea: Update logging call to use Log4j 2's entry/exit tracing method.
Add class-level Javadoc and inline comments to improve code documentation.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Users.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 10+ compatibility.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Users.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not available in Jakarta EE 10+ (Tomcat 10.1+), causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Users.general_idea: Update package reference for User class from dao to bean package.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Users.why_exists: The class com.example.jees.dao.User no longer exists or has been moved, causing compilation error.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Users.general_idea: Add Log4j logger instance and import for logging support.
Rename Gson instance variable to follow Java naming conventions (camelCase).
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Users.before: private final Gson GSON = new Gson();
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Users.after: private final Gson gson = new Gson();

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Users.general_idea: Use try-with-resources for PrintWriter to ensure proper resource management.
Add class-level Javadoc and method-level comments for documentation.
Add trace logging entry at the start of the doGet method.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 10+ compatibility.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not available in Jakarta EE 10+ containers (e.g., Tomcat 10.1+), causing ClassNotFoundException at runtime or compile errors if javax jars are removed.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.general_idea: Add import for jakarta.servlet.http.HttpSession to support session management.
Add Log4j imports for logging functionality.
Add class-level Javadoc and header comments.

 * Introduction to Jakarta Enterprise Edition - Servlet
 * 
 * https://github.com/egalli64/jees
 */

 * Login servlet

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.general_idea: Add static Logger field for Log4j logging.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.after: private static final Logger log = LogManager.getLogger(Login.class);

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.general_idea: Change servlet method from doPost to doGet to handle GET requests.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.before: protected void doPost(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response)
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.after: protected void doGet(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response)

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.general_idea: Add trace logging entry for the user parameter.
Remove password parameter retrieval as it is no longer used in the simplified logic.
Simplify login logic to store user in session and forward to home.jsp instead of conditional forwarding.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.before:
String url = user == null || user.isBlank() || password == null || password.isBlank() ? "unknown.jsp" : "logged.jsp";
request.getRequestDispatcher(url).forward(request, response);

src/main/webapp/META-INF/context.xml.general_idea: Update commented-out DataSource resource definitions to use the new project name 'hron' instead of 'me'.
Add a commented-out PostgreSQL DataSource resource definition as an alternative database option.
Update the header comment to reflect the new project title and repository URL.
src/main/webapp/META-INF/context.xml.after: <!-- Introduction to Jakarta Enterprise Edition - Servlet --> <!-- https://github.com/egalli64/jees -->

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Migrate web.xml namespace and schema from Java EE (javax) to Jakarta EE (jakarta) to support Tomcat 10+ and Jakarta Servlet 6.0.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Tomcat 10+ and Jakarta EE 9+ require the jakarta.* namespace; using the old javax namespace causes deployment failures or classloading errors.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Add session timeout configuration to enforce a 10-minute idle timeout.
Update resource reference to use the new JDBC data source name 'jdbc/hron'.
Update context parameter 'admin' value to a more descriptive name.
Remove custom error page definitions for 404 and 500 errors.
Rename application display name from 'Java EE Servlet' to 'JEE Servlet'.

src/main/webapp/index.html.general_idea: Update HTML title and heading to reflect the migration from Java EE to Jakarta EE.
Add language attribute to the HTML root element for better accessibility and standards compliance.
Restructure the navigation links to group examples by Jakarta EE feature (Servlet, Session, DataSource, etc.) and update link targets to match the new project structure.
